title: Don't Clear My Tag
description: Logs a warning when a datapack overrides a tag
body:
Logs a warning when a datapack overrides a tag. The logging will look something like this:
```
[Worker-Main-5/WARN] [minecraft/TagLoader]: Tag entries for curios:tags/items/belt.json cleared by dontclearmytag-1.0.0.jar
```
